weight_transform: gamma and beta each reshaped to [1, 1, 1, hidden] broadcast shape and tilized; padded to tile boundary
applicability_notes: Contiguous chain seen in all falcon40b layernorm call sites: bcast MUL (gamma) immediately followed by bcast ADD (beta) on a layernorm output computed with gamma=None/beta=None. Equivalent to the affine tail of torch layernorm: x * gamma + beta. Both ops share the same dim and memory_config.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: layernorm output slice, hidden=8192-class (falcon40b), per-slice seq chunk

memory_config.shard_spec_template: sharded memconfig shared across MUL and ADD in the chain; result then sharded_to_interleaved(_partial) to DRAM

placement_observations.source: falcon40b decoder layernorm gamma/beta call sites (memconfig / self.sharded_memconfig), followed by sharded_to_interleaved to dram_memcfg
falcon40b ln_attn_gamma/ln_attn_beta/ln_mlp_gamma/ln_mlp_beta tensors consumed by sharded bcast
